notes: M1 gate verification sprint. Closes M1 (2026-04-24) per plan §1 exit criteria: all WS-1 + WS-2 tasks closed, replay test passes, external pentest dry-run, zero unauth data routes. All M1-GATE-* tasks depend on week-115 and week-116 being closed. CEO agent produces GO/NO-GO memo for founder. No M2 work starts until founder signs off.

tasks.description: Replay test end-to-end — proves duplicate-settlement immunity
tasks.context:
Build integration test that creates invoice, settles via mock tx, replays the same txHash, asserts second settlement returns DUPLICATE_TX per M1-MONEY-02 acceptance.

File: backend/src/__integration__/replay-prevention.test.ts

Acceptance: test fails BEFORE M1-MONEY-02 lands (prove it catches the bug) and passes AFTER. This is the canonical proof-of-immunity test cited in the M1 gate exit criteria. Document in test comments: 'Regression test for plan §1 M1 exit criterion: Replay test passes.'

tasks.description: Unauth route table test — zero unauth sensitive routes
tasks.context:
Per M1-SEC-01 acceptance in plan §3.

File: backend/src/__tests__/app.unauth.test.ts

Build a table test that curls every route module without auth header and asserts 401 for all routes except the explicit allowlist: healthRoutes and /.well-known/*. The test lists every mounted route from backend/src/app.ts:57-82 and iterates. Acceptance: test enumerates every route and passes — if a new route is added without auth, this test must fail.

tasks.description: External pentest dry-run via OWASP ZAP
tasks.context:
Run OWASP ZAP (or equivalent automated scan) against staging (or local backend if staging not up). Target: 0 Critical, 0 High findings. Medium findings get a ticket in the backlog with a dated remediation plan.

Deliverable: reports/security/pentest-dry-run-2026-04-24.md with findings, severity, remediation status, and raw ZAP output attached.

Acceptance: report file exists and is signed by security agent; all Critical + High findings are either fixed in-sprint or explicitly blocked on a listed M2 task.

tasks.description: CI secret scan (pulled forward from M3-INF-05 per founder decision)
tasks.context:
Add trufflehog or gitleaks job to .github/workflows/ci.yml. Fail build on any secret match. Also wire scripts/verify-clean-repo.sh from M1-SEC-09 as a CI step.

Founder decision 2026-04-17: pulling this check forward from M3-INF-05 to M1 because a leaking secret is a gate-breaking risk for investor diligence.

Acceptance: CI run on a PR that adds a test .env with a dummy key fails. CI run on current main passes.

tasks.description: M1 status memo and GO/NO-GO recommendation for founder
tasks.context:
Produce reports/milestones/m1-status-2026-04-24.md.

Contents:
  1. Per-task completion status for all 16 WS-1 + WS-2 tasks (M1-MONEY-01..07, M1-SEC-01..09).
  2. Acceptance-test evidence: test file paths, pass/fail, last green run timestamp.
  3. Any open gaps with named owner and ETA.
  4. Recommended GO/NO-GO for M1 gate close.
  5. Signed by CEO agent and reviewed by CTO agent before delivery to founder.

Acceptance: founder reads, approves, and signs off. If NO-GO, memo must name the blocking tasks and their ETA. Per plan §0.5, founder is sole approver of gate close.
